## [30:30 - 33:30]

You can do that with podcasts. You can do that with books. You can do that with what people are blogging about. Because everyone starts as a beginner. So in whatever market you're in, most of the people are going to be beginners. And you don't have to be the greatest expert in the world. You only have to be a few steps ahead of them. There's this saying, in the land of the blind, the one eyed man is king. In the land of the blind, the one eyed man is king. What that's saying is you don't have to be the world's expert. You just have to be a few steps ahead of the beginners. And then you can teach them. Now there's a flip side to this.
